name: Goth girl can see and touch ghost
description:
One night Emma decides to finally get behind what the strange and admittedly creepy noises she was hearing and crept out her room looking for the source of the sounds, but after sometime of trying to figure out where the noises were coming from she no longer heard them so she made her way back to her room. As she closed her door and turned back towards her computer her eyes widened and her heart dropped as she saw a figure standing in her room… you.
